summary: Focused frontend verification on /command-center for (a) native <select> dark-dropdown styling fix and (b) new product autocomplete → HS auto-fill feature, plus regression that workspace + Costing module still work. All three scenarios PASS.

evidence.cc-new-importer: FOUND (same CSS rule applies via select option globally)

verified_scenarios.note: CSS rule `select option, select optgroup { background-color:#0b1220; color:#e2e8f0 }` in /app/frontend/src/index.css is applied to every target select. No more white/blank popups.

evidence.query 'towel': 4 suggestions, first = cc-new-sugg-630260 'Toilet or kitchen linen of cotton terry towelling'
evidence.after pick: cc-new-product='Toilet or kitchen linen of cotton terry towelling', cc-new-hs='630260' (auto-filled to 6-digit HS)

verified_scenarios.scenario: Regression — create project carries product+HS into workspace/Costing

evidence.header title: 'Toilet or kitchen linen of cotton terry towelling · trade project' | India → United States
evidence.Trade Costing module: Renders Quantity, Unit, Incoterm, Destination Port, Margin, Your Currency, Global Currency, cost build-up (EXW/Packing/Inland/THC/Customs/Freight/Insurance) with reactive FOB/CIF totals

critical_code_review_comments: HS search relevance is weak — searching 'rice' returned 'Dentifrices' (HS 330610) as the top match (substring match on 'rice' inside 'dentifRICEs'). Not in the scope of this iteration but worth improving the /api/trade-intel/hs-search ranking (prefer word-boundary / description-start matches, then substring).
index.css `select option` uses `!important` globally — fine for now, but if any future light-theme surface is introduced it may need scoping.
Guest 401 from leadnation-lfrhs.ondigitalocean.app/api is logged in console (expected — no auth), consider silencing that request on /command-center to keep console clean.
test_credentials: None — guest X-Trade-Session UUID auto-generated by frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix (dark <select> option bg) and product autocomplete feature both verified end-to-end on Chromium via Playwright. Selects render with #0b1220 background and light text as designed. Autocomplete uses /api/trade-intel/hs-search and correctly autofills the 6-digit HS. Only non-blocking observation is weak HS search relevance ('rice' returns 'dentifrices' first).
